goal: UR10 cuRobo TWO-cube color-routing pick-place: Cube_1 (red) → Bin_red, Cube_2 (blue) → Bin_blue. Validates cuRobo color_routing dispatch with raycast workaround on UR10.
thoughts:
Color-routing on UR10 pedestal scene:
1) UR10 base + table + pedestals same as CP-81.
2) Cube_1 = red, Cube_2 = blue. Set semantic_label color and visual material via create_material + assign_material.
3) Two bins: /World/Bin_red at (0.5, -0.4, 0.75) and /World/Bin_blue at (0.5, -0.55, 0.75) — different y to keep separate.
4) drop_targets dict: {'red': '/World/Bin_red', 'blue': '/World/Bin_blue'}.
5) Validates raycast workaround integrates with color-routing dispatch — cube finds correct bin per its semantic label.
6) simulate_traversal_check measures Cube_1 → Bin_red only.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.7, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/UR10", prim_type="Xform")
add_reference(prim_path="/World/UR10", reference_path="/mnt/shared_data/isaac-sim-assets-complete-5.0.0/Assets/Isaac/5.0/Collected_Robots/ur10.usd")
teleport_prim(prim_path="/World/UR10", position=[0, 0, 0.75])

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Pedestal_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.5, 0.55, 0.875], scale=[0.06, 0.06, 0.075])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Pedestal_1", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Pedestal_2", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.5, 0.25, 0.875], scale=[0.06, 0.06, 0.075])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Pedestal_2", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Red cube
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.5, 0.55, 0.975], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=["/World/Cube_1"], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", material_name="rubber")
set_semantic_label(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", semantic_type="color", class_name="red")

# Blue cube
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_2", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.5, 0.25, 0.975], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_2", schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=["/World/Cube_2"], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_2", material_name="rubber")
set_semantic_label(prim_path="/World/Cube_2", semantic_type="color", class_name="blue")

create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin_red", position=[0.5, -0.30, 0.75], size=[0.20, 0.20, 0.15])
create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin_blue", position=[0.5, -0.55, 0.75], size=[0.20, 0.20, 0.15])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    robot_family="ur10",
    target_source="curobo",
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1", "/World/Cube_2"],
    destination_path="/World/Bin_red",
    color_routing={"red": "/World/Bin_red", "blue": "/World/Bin_blue"},
    end_effector_offset=[0.0, 0.0, 0.02],
)
extension_notes: CP-82 = converted from builtin to cuRobo. cuRobo handler implements _destination_path_for via Semantics_color lookup; builtin handler doesn't.
failure_modes: set_semantic_label / Semantics_color attribute may need specific schema names — handler reads Semantics_color, Semantics_colour, Semantics_class.
Bin proximity (10cm gap between bins) may cause cube-to-wrong-bin if drop accuracy is poor.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (drop-precision XY arrival gate (UR10 cuRobo))
